selected_markets.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be <54° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Feb 14 Denver high <54°F is rare but possible. Historical data shows ~7-9% frequency for this condition in mid-February. Market mid_prob at 6.5% appears slightly underpriced given enrich_bias of +3.5%. Adjusted upward to 7.2% accounting for positive bias and seasonal patterns, but confidence moderate due to weather volatility and limited sample size for exact threshold.
